label: Single Agent
description: Run one agent through openagentic-proxy with orchestration='parallel'. Returns the unwrapped output plus the per-agent results array.

settings.name: prompt
settings.label: Prompt / task
settings.description: The user task. One of prompt, task, or agentId is required.

settings.name: agentId
settings.label: Agent ID
settings.description: DB agent id to dispatch to.

ai.shortDescription: Run one DB-backed agent via openagentic-proxy.
ai.whenToUse: When the workflow has one specific agent it wants to run (by id or role) — different from agent_spawn which uses high-level role hints.
ai.examplePrompt: run the 'data-analyst' agent on the trigger payload

outputAssertions.name: agent_returned_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Single agent did not return any content.

outputAssertions.name: agent_completed_status
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Single agent did not complete successfully.

outputAssertions.name: agent_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || !result.content || !result.content.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Single agent returned a refusal or 'no info' response.
